steps.title: Identify what the finding shows
steps.content: Lepofsky et al. found that the practice described in the songs — terraced clam gardens — corresponded with larger, more abundant clams. So the songs preserved an effective method for cultivating a food source.

steps.title: Match the inference
steps.content:
D generalizes the finding: effective methods for cultivating sources of sustenance are preserved in Indigenous songs. A overreaches to a 'defining characteristic' of all the music, B speculates about motivation rather than the demonstrated finding, and C invents a species change not supported by the text.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
